name: ome
description: Orchestrated Multi-agent Engine — spawn and orchestrate AI agent CLIs

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test && npm run lint:pkg && npm run publish:dry-run
scripts.lint:pkg: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); const req=['name','version','bin','main','types']; for(const k of req){if(!p[k])throw new Error('missing '+k)} if(!p.files.includes('dist/src/'))throw new Error('files[] must include dist/src/')"
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
